{{Infobox group
| name = House Shen
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[House Shen Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House]] [[Shen]] is a powerful faction led by the [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]]. Historically, the group was known as the [[Shen tribe]] and was once associated with [[House Gray]]. The organization is characterized by its significant wealth and vast resources, which [[Reigan Shen]] has frequently utilized to fund large-scale military movements, hire imperial armies, and acquire spatial treasures. Despite its immense strength and advantages in numbers, the house has faced significant depletion of its assets due to the high costs of its ambitions and various conflicts. The house maintains several notable locations and assets, including the [[White Lion Bank]]—a massive marble fortress that serves as a city—and various collections of relics, some of which include [[Abidan]] artifacts. Their military capabilities include fleets of cloudships and numerous [[sacred artists]]. While [[House]] [[Shen]] is considered stronger than [[House Arelius]] in many respects, its forces have faced challenges from strategic opponents like the [[Oracle Sage]]. The house's influence and stability have been impacted by large-scale destruction, including the loss of its tower and various architectural structures during intense battles.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[House Shen]] is a rival and neighbor of [[House Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[House Shen]] is a group associated with [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[House Shen]] is suspected of owning territory on the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[House Shen]] is readied for war.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[House Shen]] has a [[Herald]] defending a museum in [[Rosegold]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[House Shen]] provided aid to [[Sha Miara]]'s people against the Dragon.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Represented by the symbol of a white lion, [[House]] [[Shen]] was a group brought to the battlefield by [[Yushi]]. While their leaders were occupied with a distant clash occurring on the [[Rosegold continent]], the house engaged in a fight utilizing their artifacts and cloudships. Despite possessing a greater number of [[sacred artists]] than their opponents, the house was ultimately forced into a retreat from the battle.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]]'s symbol is a white lion.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]] is involved in a distant clash on the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]] has leaders who were occupied.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]] is involved in a fight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]] has cloudships and artifacts.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]] is retreating from the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]] had more [[sacred artists]] than the opposing force.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[House Shen]] is a group that [[Yushi]] brought to the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[House Shen]] is the family of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“That’s how many more sacred artists House Shen had than we did.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
